newsArray.title: 'Plays like gully cricket': Mohammed Kaif in awe of Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's blazing century
newsArray.description: Teenage sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, aged 15, has earned high praise from Mohammad Kaif for his explosive 103 off 37 balls in IPL 2026. Kaif lauded the youngster's fearless, aggressive approach against top bowlers, calling him a rare, once-in-a-generation talent. His consistent high strike-rate and mature batting suggest a bright future for Indian cricket.

newsArray.title: LSG vs KKR Live Score, IPL 2026: Both Teams Eye To Keep Playoffs Chances Alive
newsArray.description: Lucknow Super Giants vs Kolkata Knight Riders Live Score, IPL 2026 T20, Match 38: Lucknow Super Giants (LSG) are facing the Kolkata Knight Riders (KKR) in match 38 of the IPL 2026 at Ekana Cricket Stadium. After losing four straight games, LSG is under a lot of pressure going into this match. They did well to limit the Rajasthan Royals previously, but in their most recent match, they failed in a pursuit of 160. With a half-century, Mitchell Marsh at last found form, although the batting lineup has been inconsistent this season. With three losses in their first three games in Lucknow, their home record has also been a big worry. On the other hand, KKR enters the match fresh off a week-long holiday and their season-opening victory over Rajasthan Royals. Rinku Singh made a strong comeback with a half-century, while Varun Chakravarthy shone with an outstanding 3 for 14 and was named Player of the Match. With indications that Matheesha Pathirana may be available for selection, the squad will try to build momentum from this victory. Squads Lucknow Super Giants: Mitchell Marsh, Ayush Badoni, Rishabh Pant(w/c), Aiden Markram, Nicholas Pooran, Himmat Singh, Mukul Choudhary, Mohammed Shami, Mayank Yadav, Digvesh Singh Rathi, Mohsin Khan, Prince Yadav, George Linde, Manimaran Siddharth, Matthew Breetzke, Abdul Samad, Avesh Khan, Josh Inglis, Anrich Nortje, Arjun Tendulkar, Shahbaz Ahmed, Akash Maharaj Singh, Akshat Raghuwanshi, Arshin Kulkarni, Naman Tiwari Kolkata Knight Riders: Tim Seifert(w), Ajinkya Rahane(c), Angkrish Raghuvanshi, Cameron Green, Rovman Powell, Rinku Singh, Ramandeep Singh, Anukul Roy, Sunil Narine, Vaibhav Arora, Kartik Tyagi, Varun Chakaravarthy, Manish Pandey, Finn Allen, Tejasvi Dahiya, Navdeep Saini, Rahul Tripathi, Sarthak Ranjan, Rachin Ravindra, Prashant Solanki, Blessing Muzarabani, Saurabh Dubey, Matheesha Pathirana, Umran Malik, Daksh Kamra
keywords: lsg vs kkr live cricket score
kolkata knight riders vs lucknow super giants live
creator: nikhil

newsArray.title: Sanju Samson Achieves 5000 Runs Milestone in IPL History
newsArray.description: Sanju Samson, the wicketkeeper-batter for Chennai Super Kings, has made history by scoring 5000 runs in the Indian Premier League, becoming only the 10th player to achieve this milestone. He reached this landmark during a match against the Gujarat Titans, showcasing his impressive batting skills. With this achievement, Samson joins an elite group of players and stands as CSK's top run-scorer in the ongoing IPL 2026 season. The article delves into his journey and highlights from the match, making it a must-read for cricket fans.
creator: narendra chaudhary
